# Mobile Rules

> Extends [root AGENTS.md](../AGENTS.md). Auto-loaded when editing `*.dart`, `lib/**`, widget tests, or Flutter stores.

## Always

- Use `high_rise_ui` components and theme tokens for Flutter UI instead of raw Material widgets. [MUST]
- Use `context.translations` for user-facing copy and keep strings in i18n files. [MUST]
- Keep widget trees compositional; extract repeated UI and wrap only reactive sections in `Observer`. [SHOULD]
- Prefer MobX non-codegen stores with `Observable`, `Computed`, and `runInAction`. [SHOULD]

## Never

- Never use raw `ElevatedButton`, `TextField`, or `AppBar` where `high_rise_ui` equivalents exist. [MUST]
- Never hardcode colors, text styles, or user-facing strings in Flutter UI. [MUST]
- Never add new MobX codegen stores with `part '*.g.dart'` and annotation macros. [SHOULD]

## Prefer

- Prefer `context.themeColors` and `context.hruTheme` over manual styling constants.
- Prefer `context.pop()` / go_router patterns over direct `Navigator.pop(context)`.
- Prefer `Mocktail` and AAA structure in unit tests.

## Verify

- Confirm UI uses `high_rise_ui` components and theme tokens.
- Confirm all copy goes through `context.translations`.
- Confirm new stores avoid MobX codegen artifacts.

## References

- [high-rise-ui](references/high-rise-ui.md) — design system and component mapping
- [context-translations](references/context-translations.md) — Flutter localization patterns
- [mobx-non-codegen](references/mobx-non-codegen.md) — store structure and `runInAction`
